scripts.test:emulators: npx firebase emulators:exec --project demo-ironlog --only firestore,auth,functions,storage "node tests/emulator-smoke.mjs"
scripts.firebase:deploy: npm run build:hosting && npx firebase deploy --project ironlog-v1 --only hosting:ironlog-v1
scripts.firebase:deploy:staging: npm run build:hosting && npx firebase deploy --project staging --only hosting,functions,firestore:rules,storage
scripts.firebase:deploy:prod: npm run build:hosting && npx firebase deploy --project prod --only hosting,functions,firestore:rules,storage
scripts.firebase:deploy:all: npm run build:hosting && npx firebase deploy --project ironlog-v1 --only hosting:ironlog-v1,functions
